scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p frontend/public/docs && cp docs/*.md frontend/public/docs/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.postbuild: rm -rf frontend_static && cp -r frontend/dist frontend_static && mkdir -p frontend_static/docs && cp docs/*.md frontend_static/docs/ 2>/dev/null || true
